recommendations.title: The Theory of Everything
recommendations.overview: The Theory of Everything is the extraordinary story of one of the world’s greatest living minds, the renowned astrophysicist Stephen Hawking, who falls deeply in love with fellow Cambridge student Jane Wilde.

recommendations.title: Shadow Dancer
recommendations.overview: In 1990s Belfast, a woman is forced to betray all she believes in for the sake of her son.

recommendations.title: Man on Wire

recommendations.title: The Hatton Garden Job

recommendations.title: Project Nim
recommendations.overview: From the team behind Man on Wire comes the story of Nim, the chimpanzee who in the 1970s became the focus of a landmark experiment which aimed to show that an ape could learn to communicate with language if raised and nurtured like a human child. Fol

recommendations.title: Ocean's Eight
recommendations.overview: Debbie Ocean, a criminal mastermind, gathers a crew of female thieves to pull off the heist of the century at New York's annual Met Gala.

recommendations.title: 6 Days
recommendations.overview: London, England, April 1980. Six terrorists assault the Embassy of Iran and take hostages. For six days, tense negotiations are held while the authorities decide whether a military squad should intervene.

recommendations.title: Finding Steve McQueen
recommendations.overview: In 1972, a gang of close-knit thieves from Youngstown, Ohio attempt to steal $30 million in illegal contributions. Based on the true story of the biggest bank heist in US history.
